source_jobs.description: <p class="" data-start="168" data-end="403">Join our Talent Community to be the first to hear about relevant roles and exciting new opportunities as LINK continues to grow. We’ll keep your experience in mind and reach out when positions that align with your background and interests open.&nbsp;</p>

notes: Design-focused org with no explicit tech roles, but mentions partnering with engineers.
